message:
feat(vdbe): add FusedOpenWriteLast opcode + peephole pattern detection

V2.2: Define Opcode::FusedOpenWriteLast (195) and add peephole detection
in ProgramBuilder::finish(). Detects OpenWrite(C,root,N) followed by
Last(C,label) and replaces with FusedOpenWriteLast + Noop.

The handler currently falls through to the cold path (the individual
OpenWrite+Last handlers execute). The dispatch savings come from the
peephole converting 2 opcodes to 1+Noop, reducing one iteration of
the interpreter loop (~5-7ns per INSERT).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
